_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting data consumer discovery, translating consumer data needs into data product requirements with defined quality, freshness, and access standards.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-A-005 (DG, cosine: 0.498), AB-S-010 (AB, cosine: 0.496).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.601). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [customers, interfacing] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, conducting, consumer, data, defined, discovery] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.897, R=0.846). P exceeds R by 0.051 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill in interfacing with customers." and "Skill in conducting data consumer discovery, translating consumer data needs int" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.501 < STS 0.601 (gap -0.100). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [customers, interfacing] and [access, conducting, consumer] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.0%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [customers, interfacing]. WIDAI-only: [access, conducting, consumer, data, defined, discovery].
